# Copilot Instructions

Follow [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) first. Package ownership, dependency, and validation rules are documented in [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md), [CAPABILITY_OWNERSHIP.md](../CAPABILITY_OWNERSHIP.md), and [DEPENDENCY_RULES.md](../DEPENDENCY_RULES.md).

Keep Package Registry changes focused on governance metadata, validation tooling, reusable CI, and audit artifacts.
